examples.title: Banker's Safety Algorithm
examples.description: Checks if system is in safe state
examples.code:
Initialize Work = Available
Finish[i] = false for all i
While all processes not finished:
  Find i where Finish[i]=false and Need[i] <= Work
  If no such i exists, break
  Work += Allocation[i]
  Finish[i] = true
If all Finish[i]=true, system is safe
examples.explanation: Simulates resource allocation to verify safe state
